description: Convert the Red/Green composite microscopy image at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/composite/unsafe_composite.tif into a colorblind-accessible Magenta/Green figure. Change Channel 1 to Magenta while keeping Channel 2 as Green. Save the resulting flattened RGB image to ~/Fiji_Data/results/figures/accessible_composite.png. Generate a Deuteranopia simulation of the figure and save it to ~/Fiji_Data/results/figures/deuteranopia_proof.png.
